heading: Records: form; inspection; preservation
label: 15722 Records: form; inspection; preservation
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 11144 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided in , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1996Pub. L. 104–88section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88section 1301 of this title
amendments: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 11144 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)

children.heading: .—Form of Records
children.label: a .—Form of Records
children.text: The Board may prescribe the form of records required to be prepared or compiled under this subchapter by pipeline carriers and lessors, including records related to movement of traffic and receipts and expenditures of money.
inspect and examine the lands, buildings, and equipment of a pipeline carrier or lessor; and

children.label: A
children.text: a pipeline carrier, lessor, or association; and

children.label: B
children.text: a person controlling, controlled by, or under common control with a pipeline carrier if the Board considers inspection relevant to that person’s relation to, or transaction with, that carrier.

children.heading: .—Preservation Period
children.label: c .—Preservation Period
children.text: The Board may prescribe the time period during which operating, accounting, and financial records must be preserved by pipeline carriers and lessors.
